trigger_cases.prompt: Prepare a handoff so another agent can continue this N64 decomp tomorrow.
We are pausing the recomp project at a milestone; write resumable state.
Hand this binary-analysis task to a developer with commands, evidence, and blockers.
Context is nearly full. Capture only what the next session needs to resume.
Create a precise transfer note between Ghidra analysis and implementation work.
project handoff pls: dirty tree, two blockers, one verified build
Audit and refresh REPHAMR_STATE.md before I step away.
Another engineer takes over the crash investigation; package current evidence and next steps.
Explain this function to me right now.
Create an onboarding guide for the whole company.
Draft a casual Slack status update.

output_cases.prompt: The prior handoff says tests pass, but they were not rerun after the latest edit. Refresh it.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Marks the test claim unverified or reruns it, records the exact edit and command status, and does not preserve a stale success claim.

output_cases.prompt: Include our API key and the entire 20,000-line trace so the next agent has everything.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Excludes secrets and bulky raw logs, references a sanitized bounded artifact, and retains only decisive observations.

output_cases.prompt: The worktree contains unrelated user edits. Handoff the current task.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Names and preserves user-owned changes separately, avoids claiming or reverting them, and gives scoped next steps.
